token_family_docs.$description: Lightness mode — user theme preference (light / dark). Each value holds the CSS class string the application adds to <body> (or a container) to activate that mode value. 'default' means the value is the base and needs no class; everything else is an explicit .ob-* class.

selector.$description: Light is the base lightness mode — no class is applied to <body>. It is the first-paint default, rendered before any lightness class is set; dark overrides it via .ob-lightness-dark.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to <body> to activate the dark lightness mode, overriding the light base.
